data.title: Vector Science & Therapeutics Files Provisional Patent for Novel Microneedle Catheter Platform for Intratumoral Drug Delivery
data.description: A new platform has been introduced that combines three research techniques to address the electrical characteristics of tumor biology in pancreatic cancer. The company, Vector Science & Therapeutics, disclosed on May 1, 2026, the submission of a provisional patent application. The stock symbol for the company is TSXV: PAIN.

data.description: The recent appointment contributes to the improvement of revenue quality and profitability as the company enhances its operational structure. This move comes at a critical juncture as the company aims to capitalize on its revamped operational base to drive growth. The appointment is expected to have a considerable impact on the company's financial performance, boosting revenue and profitability numbers.

data.title: National Pediatric Cancer Foundation Awards $1 Million Grant to Advance Breakthrough Research for Rare Pediatric Cancer
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on May 1st, 2026, the National Pediatric Cancer Foundation (NPCF) has granted $1 million to JinSeok Park, PhD from Children's Hospital Los Angeles. The funding will aid in research focusing on Metastatic Fusion‑positive Rhabdomyosarcoma, with an aim to further mechanistic and translational studies in this field.

data.title: Linden Creek Expands Luxury Home Staging and Interior Design Services to Charleston, SC
data.description: A new franchise location of Linden Creek, a upscale interior design and home staging company based in Raleigh, North Carolina, has opened in Charleston, SC, to cater to the broader Lowcountry area. This recent expansion marks a significant development for the company, as it broadens its reach to serve a new market.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rises As Apple Jumps On Earnings; Roblox, Sandisk, Western Digital Dive (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase in value, mainly due to Apple's positive earnings report. However, Roblox, Sandisk, and Western Digital saw significant declines in their stock prices. The overall trend in the stock market today was a rise in the Dow, driven by Apple's strong performance, while Roblox, Sandisk, and Western Digital faced notable decreases. This news was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: DOSE PARTNERS WITH JUICE PRESS TO DEBUT LIMITED-TIME SMOOTHIE, BRINGING CLINICALLY-BACKED WELLNESS TO EVERYDAY RITUALS
data.description: Throughout the month of May 2026, the Dose of Vitality smoothie infused with Dose for your Liver® supplement will be offered at all Juice Press stores across the nation. This daily ritual aims to promote lasting vitality and is supported by clinical research. New York-based Dose, a reputable supplement brand, is leading the initiative to redefine daily health practices.

data.title: Mastech Digital to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results; Participate in Upcoming Investor Conference
data.description: On May 1, 2026, Mastech Digital, Inc. (NYSE American: MHH), a prominent Digital Transformation IT Services company, revealed the scheduled release date of its financial report for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Cboe Canada’s Tanya Rowntree Elected Board Chair of Women in ETFs
data.description: In Toronto, Cboe Canada is pleased to announce Tanya Rowntree, the Senior Director and Head of Listings, has been elected as the Board Chair of Women in ETFs, Inc. Women in ETFs is a prominent organization within the industry that focuses on supporting and advancing the role of women in the exchange-traded funds sector. Rowntree's election marks a significant achievement, showcasing her leadership and expertise in this field. She will be leading the organization in its mission to promote gender diversity and inclusion, with a strong emphasis on empowering women in the financial industry. This appointment highlights Cboe Canada's commitment to gender equality and supporting women in key leadership positions.

data.title: Nasus Pharma to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on May 1, 2026, Nasus Pharma Ltd. (NYSE: NSRX) revealed plans for participation in investor conferences. The company, specializing in innovative intranasal products at a clinical stage, aims to engage with potential investors. Nasus Pharma's management will be involved in these forthcoming events, aligning with their efforts to showcase their offerings and expand their market presence.

data.title: Williamson County ESD9 Expands Wildfire Response Capabilities with New Specialized Equipment for the Sam Bass Fire Department
data.description: Yesterday, in Williamson County, Texas, Emergency Services District No. 9 (ESD9) unveiled advanced equipment for the Sam Bass Fire Department. This move enhances the department's ability to respond to emergencies and wildfires in the area.

data.title: MSC CRUISES TO BRING EXCLUSIVE MSC YACHT CLUB EXPERIENCE TRACKSIDE AT 2026 FORMULA 1® CRYPTO.COM MIAMI GRAND PRIX
data.description: Taking inspiration from MSC Cruises' unique onboard MSC Yacht Club concept, the brand plans to revolutionize their renowned "ship-within-a-ship" experience into an extraordinary race weekend adventure. This exclusive event will be hosted at the revamped Marina at the Miami International Autodrome.

data.title: MM Brands Announces Strategic Partnership with StateHouse Holdings to Expand Mary's Medicinals and DIXIE in California
data.description: On May 1, 2026, MM Brands Inc., comprising popular cannabis brands like Mary's Medicinals and DIXIE, revealed a key collaboration with StateHouse Holdings Inc. intended to grow their presence in California. As per the deal, StateHouse obtained a license to operate MM Brands' products in California, marking a significant move in the company's expansion strategy. This partnership aims to capitalize on the thriving cannabis market in California, which boasts impressive sales figures and consumer demand for high-quality products.
